title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Pilgrim - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Pilgrim - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Pilgrim! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Jodhpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Pilgrim:
Pilgrim is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pilgrim!
